hero.title: Data Scientist · Algiers
hero.description: M.Sc. Data Science student with a background in psychology & neuroscience. I build models that sit at the intersection of human behavior and data.

paragraphs: I'm a first-year Data Science master's student based in Algiers, Algeria, with a bachelor's degree in Computer Systems. My background in software engineering and systems architecture shapes how I approach problems — focusing on building scalable, efficient, and data-driven solutions.

I'm currently developing a portfolio of projects at the intersection of data science and web technologies, including predictive modeling, data analysis, and full-stack applications with integrated machine learning components.
I prioritize hands-on learning, working with real datasets, and understanding the statistical and algorithmic foundations behind each model — from feature engineering to evaluation.
Outside of tech, I design and sew clothes — an activity that reinforces my attention to detail and iterative approach to building and improving systems.

info.value: Machine Learning · Data Analysis · Web Applications

projects.title: Depression Risk Prediction Model
projects.label: Featured · 01
projects.desc: A clinical risk prediction model using the CDC NHANES survey dataset. Combines behavioral, demographic, and physiological variables to predict depression risk scores — and explores what self-reported survey data can, and can't, tell us about mental health outcomes.

projects.title: Algeria Wildfire Risk Mapping
projects.label: Geospatial
projects.desc: Geospatial wildfire risk model using NASA FIRMS fire detection data. Maps historical patterns across Algerian territory to produce regional risk scores.

projects.title: Sales & Commerce Analytics
projects.label: Commerce
projects.desc: End-to-end sales prediction and customer segmentation pipeline. Purchasing behavior patterns and a forecasting model built on retail data.

projects.title: Conflict Analytics
projects.label: Conflict
projects.desc: Quantitative analysis of conflict event data. Spatial and temporal pattern detection combining NLP and geospatial methods on open-source datasets.

projects.title: Job Market Analysis
projects.label: Labor Market
projects.desc: Scraping and analyzing data science job postings to extract skill demand trends, salary patterns, and geographic distributions.

projects.title: Behavioral Change Patterns
projects.label: Behavioral
projects.desc: Personal exploratory project using data to study procrastination, avoidance, and the gap between self-awareness and action. Psych theory meets self-tracking data.

contact.blurb: I'm open to internship opportunities, research collaborations, and connecting with people working at the intersection of data, health, and behavior.
